title: Settling in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
Settling in a new country can be an exciting, but challenging experience. Our free services are here to help you transition smoothly to everyday life in Canada.
Starting April 1, 2026, economic class permanent residents can only access newcomer services for a limited time.
- the changes to the eligibility period
- why we made the changes

### Find newcomer services in Canada
Permanent residents can get help from settlement service providers for free.

### Pre-arrival services
Get free in-person and online services to help you prepare for life in Canada before you arrive .

### Learn English or French
Get resources to help you improve your English or French.
Learn about driver’s licenses, road rules and car insurance.
Learn about your first tax year, benefits and credits.
Resources for newcomer women
Resources for newcomer youth
Prepare to cross the border to settle in Canada
Bring goods to Canada
Get your credentials assessed
Get a social insurance number
Work as an intern for the federal government
Connect with people in your community
Carrying your identification
Explore Parks Canada

## Learning about Canada
Provinces and territories
How money works in Canada

### Funding, statistics and resources for service providers
Find funding opportunities, reports and research, and find out how settlement and resettlement programs are delivered.

### Permanent resident cards and status
Get your PR card or PR travel document and manage your status as a permanent resident.

### Protect yourself from fraud
Learn about common scams aimed at newcomers and the ways to recognize, avoid and report them.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
